codeReview.summary: Fix commit dbb2bfe4 addresses the prior blocker from m6-planner-upgrade-and-dispatch-gates by moving approval/terminal guards ahead of reviewRunLauncher in missionDispatchPacket and adding launcher-enabled VAL-DAEMON-009 tests that assert rejected dispatches produce zero launch side effects.

summary: Reviewed both the original failed feature diff (06c1a2a3) and the fix diff (dbb2bfe4). Original behavior launched reviewRunLauncher before dispatch eligibility checks; fix now checks mission approval and terminal status first (MissionControlService.swift:202-216), then launches. New tests with a non-nil launcher verify unapproved and cancelled dispatch attempts throw expected errors and keep launcher call count at zero (OpenBurnBarMissionControlServiceTests.swift:984-1125).
